name: input
description: A token-styled single-line native <input>. Carries a real name (POSTs JS-off), binds via l:model on the native input/change events, aria-invalid from the invalid flag, height-based `size` (sm/md/lg) that aligns to the button + native-select in a toolbar row. Server-first replacement for the never-form-associated Lit island.
docs: Copies the input partial to your JTE root at lievit/input.jte, reached as @template.lievit.input(name=...). The native <input> POSTs under `name` with zero JS; bind to a wire field with `model`. `size` (sm=h-8, md=h-9 default, lg=h-10) is height-based so the input lines up flush with a button / native-select of the matching size in a toolbar. The source is yours: edit freely.
